organSystemConditionContext.plainEnglishMeaning: The safe output for this package is an evidence-availability report. It explains which model, clinical, professional, and organ-system inputs are missing and avoids medical conclusions from missing evidence.
unsupportedClaims: Diagnosis, personal disease risk, carrier status, variant classification, symptom status, severity, prognosis, lab status, imaging status, vital-sign status, organ-function status, treatment need, medication response, supplement need, diet need, exercise guidance, screening need, testing need, prevention action, clearance, emergency action, all-clear reassurance, and clinical actionability are not supported by this fixture.
Authenticated Sequencing.com sample rows are not present, so sample report labels and row meanings are not reconstructed.
organSystemConditionContext.professionalReview: Use this as a local-agent readiness fixture only. Health decisions require validated test scope, relevant clinical context, and qualified professional review.

professionalReview: Keep this output educational and non-diagnostic.
Do not use this fixture to start, stop, or change testing, screening, medication, supplements, diet, exercise, or treatment.
Use qualified professional review for health decisions or symptoms.

Reference resources used for boundary language: CDC Genetic Testing; MedlinePlus Genetics; MedlinePlus: Genetic Testing; MedlinePlus Genetics: Interpreting Genetic Test Results; FDA Direct-to-Consumer Tests; MedlinePlus Genetics: complex disorders; NHGRI overview of polygenic risk scores; GWAS Catalog; NIDDK: Kidney Disease; MedlinePlus: Kidney Diseases; MedlinePlus: Kidneys and Urinary System.
The result is a deterministic synthetic validation artifact for local-agent packaging, not a medical interpretation.
